calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-02-2024 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-12-2024 Continued To Dec-02-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Oct-23-2024 Off Calendar

Petition For Determination Of Entitlement To Estate Assets
Off Calendar Oct-28-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Janet Espey appeared via zoom for Michael Ng (petitioner).

The Court withdraws Ms. Nelson-Beckers client's objection. Petition for determination of entitlement to estate assets is taken under submission. Petition for Probate of Will etc. is taken off calendar.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Colohour. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-19-2024 Continued To Nov-12-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Aug-14-2024 Continued To Oct-23-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Determination Of Entitlement To Estate Assets
Off Calendar Jul-03-2024 Continued To Oct-23-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Janet Espey appeared by zoom for Micheal Ng and Kristine Ng (co-executors).
Laura Becker for Loretta Braley (interested party/objector).

Mrs. Espey stated that she just received the objection, that she has a plan for responding to it, that a two month continuance will give her enough time to compile what she needs and file it, that the petition for final distribution is set for August 19th and that she will request a continuance on that too as she will need to amend that petition. Mrs. Becker stated that the majority of the issues raised in the objections are issues of law, that she believes the reliefs requested are time barred as a matter of law because of the court's 2020 order that was issued and that she prefers not to continue the matter for two months. Counsel presented further oral arguments to support their positions. The Petition for Determination of Entitlement to Estate Assets is continued to October 23, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mrs. Espey is to respond to the objections by September 4, 2024. Mrs. Becker is to file a reply by October 2, 2024.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Lopes. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-22-2024 Continued To Aug-19-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-04-2024 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-04-2024 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-22-2024 Continued To Mar-04-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear and order to show cause will be issued to the Attorney Janet Espey to appear on March 4, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to show why sanctions in the amount of $250.00 should not be imposed under CCP 128 for failure to appear. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-13-2023 Continued To Jan-22-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-07-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Aug-11-2020 is admitted to probate. Michael Ng and Kristine L. Ng are appointed co-Executors of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Shirley Yawitz is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Nov-13-2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Cristobal. Not Reported.
